templateInputs.audience: people reviewing an AI-generated product mockup
templateInputs.goal: check whether the generated direction is clear enough to continue
templateInputs.successSignal: Voters can understand the offer and name one reason it would or would not work.

question.title: Is this generated product mockup clear enough to continue?
question.description: Review the uploaded mockup image. Vote up if the concept is understandable, credible, and worth iterating. Vote down if the image is confusing, generic, or missing essential context. In feedback, mention the biggest change that would improve the next version.
